---
title: "ggplot example"
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)

theme_set(theme_bw())
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

```

```{r}
#| include: false

ds <- read_csv("data/fruits_long.csv")

```

```{r}

ds |> 
  count(fruit) |>
  mutate(fruit = fct_reorder(fruit, n)) |> 
  
  ggplot(aes(x = fruit, y = n)) + 
  
  geom_col() +
  
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Most popular fruits",
    x = "Fruit", y = "Count"
  ) 

```

```{r}

ds |> 
  count(fruit, diet_type) |>
  mutate(fruit = fct_reorder(fruit, n)) |> 
  
  ggplot(aes(x = fruit, y = n, fill = diet_type)) + 
  
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title =  "Fruits by diet type",
    x = "Fruit", y = "Count"
  ) 

```
